rationale: In the citing paper, Spiller et al. (2013) is cited in a methodological context when the authors state that their interaction significance tests use simple slope analysis. This is not just a general literature list mention; it supports how they probe and interpret interaction terms in their supplementary individual-level/keyword-level regressions. Although the citation is brief and appears with another source, the functional role is clear and directly tied to an analysis choice.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Spiller et al. (2013) as methodological guidance for conducting simple-effects/simple-slope tests in moderated regression when interpreting interaction effects.
